decks.notes: The deck focuses on using efficient counter spells and disruption effects to protect the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought with Stifle, allowing for a powerful early game threat that can quickly close out the game. The deck includes card draw and selection to help find key pieces of the combo, along with additional protection in the form of Daze and Counterspell. The strategy is to control the tempo of the game and capitalize on the opponent's vulnerabilities to secure a swift victory.

The main strategy of this deck is to quickly resolve a Phyrexian Dreadnought, using cards like Stifle, Counterspell, and Foil to protect it from removal. By utilizing cards like Gush and Opt for card draw and selection, the deck aims to find its combo pieces efficiently. Additional control elements like Misdirection, Daze, and Thwart help to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes versatile cards like Vision Charm and Morphling for additional utility and threat options.

This deck is focused on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of aggressive Goblin creatures. By using cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to quickly flood the board with creatures, supported by Goblin Warchief and Siege-Gang Commander for additional power, this deck aims to bring down the opponent's life total as fast as possible. The inclusion of removal spells like Gempalm Incinerator and Naturalize, along with land disruption from cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland, helps to control the game and secure victory through overwhelming aggression.

The strategy of this deck revolves around using counterspells, card draw, and removal spells to control the game while building up card advantage. The main win condition is to play Psychatog, a powerful, efficient creature that can quickly finish off the opponent once the board is under control. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's plans, protect its own key cards, and ultimately outvalue the opponent through efficient card draw and smart plays. It is a patient and calculating deck that aims to win through careful resource management and strategic decision-making.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Ill-Gotten Gains combo to effectively disrupt the opponent's hand and graveyard while also generating card advantage for the player. The deck aims to cycle through cards quickly with draw spells like Opt and Accumulated Knowledge, generate mana with rituals and Lotus Petal, and eventually win the game by casting Brain Freeze to mill the opponent's library. The inclusion of Cephalid Coliseum and Lion's Eye Diamond adds additional synergy and ways to dig for combo pieces.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with enchantments using cards like Attunement and Frantic Search, then use Replenish to bring them back onto the battlefield all at once. Opalescence turns all enchantments into creatures, providing a win condition by overwhelming the opponent with a large army. Other key cards like Parallax Wave and Decree of Silence help control the board and prevent the opponent from interfering with the combo. Tsabo's Web disrupts the opponent's mana base, while Seal of Cleansing offers removal options. Overall, the deck aims to execute its combo efficiently and overwhelm the opponent.

The deck focuses on using cards like Attunement and Intuition to fill the graveyard with enchantments, then casting Replenish to bring them all back into play at once. Key combo pieces include Opalescence and Parallax Wave to control the board and lock down opponent's creatures. Cards like Abeyance and Decree of Silence help protect the combo from disruption, while Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing provide removal options. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence generated from the graveyard, ultimately leading to victory.

The deck revolves around using various card draw and manipulation spells to dig for and assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle, allowing for a quick win by putting a massive creature into play for a minimal cost. The deck also includes a suite of counterspells and disruption to protect the combo and control the game until it can be assembled. Additionally, there are some bounce spells and versatile cards like Chain of Vapor to deal with opposing threats or disrupt the opponent's strategy.

The deck revolves around using Stifles to counter opponent's threats while setting up the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo to quickly overwhelm and win the game. The deck also includes card draw spells like Gush and Opt to fuel the combo, as well as counterspells like Counterspell and Foil to protect it. The goal is to efficiently control the game with disruption spells like Portent and Chain of Vapor, allowing the player to assemble the combo and outmaneuver their opponent.

This deck focuses on controlling the board through removal and disruption spells, while also utilizing various card advantage engines like Skeletal Scrying and Eternal Dragon. The key strategy is to handle threats efficiently with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Vindicate, while also generating card advantage to outvalue the opponent in the long game. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Exalted Angel and Death Grasp to close out games once the opponent's resources have been exhausted. Additionally, there are land destruction elements like Dust Bowl to further disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to create a powerful enchantress engine by using cards like Enchantress's Presence and Argothian Enchantress to draw cards whenever enchantments are cast. The deck aims to control the board using cards like Parallax Wave and Seal of Cleansing, while also utilizing Opalescence to turn enchantments into creatures for additional win conditions. The deck also includes various means of ramp and card selection to ensure consistency in executing its combo strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize enchantments, particularly the Enchantress cards, to generate card advantage and mana acceleration. By combining Enchantress's Presence with cards like Sterling Grove and Mirri's Guile, the deck can quickly cycle through its library and find key combo pieces. The deck also includes supporting cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave to create a win condition. Overall, this deck aims to control the board with enchantments while setting up a game-winning combo to overwhelm the opponent.

The deck is focused on quickly and efficiently assembling the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat that can quickly close out the game. It includes a variety of cheap cantrips and counterspells to help find and protect the combo pieces, with additional disruption like Portent and Chain of Vapor to control the game and disrupt opponents' strategies. The goal is to outmaneuver opponents and win before they have a chance to stabilize or disrupt the combo.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Sphere of Resistance and Wasteland while also controlling the board with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Winter's Grasp. The key strategy revolves around using Oath of Druids to cheat out powerful creatures like Terravore early in the game. The deck also includes land destruction elements to slow down the opponent's mana development, allowing for the control player to establish a dominant board presence. Overall, the deck aims to control the game tempo and win through powerful creature threats.

The main focus of this deck is to aggressively deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible, utilizing low-cost, high-impact creatures and burn spells. By consistently applying pressure and burning the opponent's life total, this deck aims to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize or mount a defense. The inclusion of cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Pyrostatic Pillar further adds to the punishing nature of the deck, ensuring that the opponent is constantly taking damage even when trying to regain control of the board.

This deck focuses on using the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to quickly bring out a powerful threat while disrupting the opponent's strategy with counterspells and card draw. The key strategy is to efficiently control the game by countering key spells and protecting the combo pieces, ultimately overwhelming the opponent with a massive creature that can end the game in just one attack. The deck is built around speed, disruption, and protection to ensure a swift victory.
